limitations: Faithfulness verdicts are LLM-judge measurements, not ground truth; judge disagreement is reported as evidence.
model.name: credit-memo-summarizer
model.owner: Commercial Lending Technology, validated by Model Risk Management
model.tier_rationale: Tier 2: the model informs but does not decide credit outcomes; every output passes human review before reaching credit committee.
model.use_case: Summarizes commercial credit memos into a one-page brief for loan officers. This example validates faithfulness: the summary must not assert anything the memo does not say.
